  Summary: Confirmed Android Java Hello World app for Vuzix Blade with Android SDK support.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Created Gradle Android project in workspace root with app module, manifest, activity, resources, and build scripts.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Skipped feature customization because this is a Hello World starter.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were provided by setup metadata.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed Gradle and Android command-line tools, configured SDK path, and completed ./gradlew assembleDebug successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran VS Code task Android: Assemble Debug successfully.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Prompted for debug launch, received confirmation, and attempted ./gradlew installDebug. Launch is ready but requires a connected Vuzix/Android device (no device detected).

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README.md exists with setup/build/deploy instructions and this file has been cleaned up by removing HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
